HR and Business Development Executive | Driving Growth & Partnerships | HR Coordination | Client Relationship Management

📌𝗪𝗲’𝗿𝗲 𝗛𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴   𝗔𝗜/𝗠𝗟 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 

𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲: 1–2 Years
𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Remote

We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Generative AI to join our growing team.

𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀 & 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹𝘀:
 • Strong proficiency in Python
 • Experience in Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence
 • Hands-on exposure to LLMs & Generative AI
 • Experience in building RAG pipelines
 • Working knowledge of LangChain / LangGraph (Agentic  Workflows)
 • Understanding of APIs, databases, and model deployment
 • Basic knowledge of NLP & Deep Learning

If you’re passionate about building LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and AI solutions, we’d love to connect.

📩 Send your resume to: srushti@the-algo.com
